description: Legal note in Judaeo-Arabic. In the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu? Dated: Sunday, 7 Tishrei 1532 Seleucid = 6 September 1220 CE. (The scribe wrote 1532 AM in error.) Abū Isḥāq b. Abū Sahl the cantor (=the brother of Yedutun ha-Levi and Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi) says that he cannot repay his debt because he is sick. (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
